# Legacy landing page (archived)

These files are the **original standalone landing page** that the production
React landing was extracted from. They are kept for reference only.

**Do not edit these to change the live site.** The canonical landing now lives in:

- `app/frontend/src/landing/markup.js` — marketing copy / HTML body
- `app/frontend/src/landing/initLanding.js` — animations
- `app/frontend/src/landing/landing.css` — styles
- `app/frontend/src/pages/Landing.jsx` — React wrapper

`GlassBox.html` + `glassbox.css` here are the frozen extraction source.
